theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury)
theme_and_archetype.description: A deeply cultural, luxurious South Indian Hindu wedding theme. Blends the warmth and purity of turmeric, saffron, and sand (Archetype 1) with the royal, cinematic depth of temple gold, dark kumkum red, and emerald green (Archetype 5).

accent.name: Mango Leaf Green
accent.usage: Secondary buttons, leaf motifs, timeline markers

surface.name: Soft Saffron Tint
surface.usage: Card backgrounds, section alternates, bento boxes

headings.usage: Hero names, section titles, stylized quotes. Use tracking-tight for H1/H2.

body.usage: Body text, nav links, schedule descriptions, RSVP form inputs.

special.usage: For the big 'Shubh Vivah' text and couple's initials.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-16 for containers. gap-8 to gap-12 for grids.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Use Mode A 'Tetris' grid for the 'Our Story' and 'Venue' sections. Asymmetrical overlapping images with soft shadows.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Glassmorphism with warm tints for sticky header. Subtle Neumorphism or flat surfaces with 1px gold/maroon borders for timeline cards.

motion_and_3d.preloader: A full-screen overlay featuring the 3D glowing diya motif (pulsing animation) that fades out seamlessly on load.
motion_and_3d.parallax_hero: Use framer-motion or CSS 3D transforms. The hero background (3D temple) scrolls slower than the foreground couple photo and floating flowers.
motion_and_3d.floating_elements: CSS keyframe animations for floating marigold flowers and banana leaves falling slowly down the screen.
motion_and_3d.timeline: Vertical line with scroll-triggered (Intersection Observer or framer-motion) fade-up and scale-in of each ritual card.
motion_and_3d.rsvp_confetti: Use 'canvas-confetti' library or custom CSS particles to shoot gold, red, and green confetti on successful RSVP submission.

components_structure.Navbar: Sticky top, backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, dark maroon text, elegant hover underlines. Mobile hamburger menu.
components_structure.Hero: 100vh. 3D Temple background. Center: D. Gayathri & D. Mano Vikas in large Cormorant Garamond. Telugu + English 'Shubh Vivah' subtitle. Live countdown timer at the bottom.
components_structure.OurStory: Asymmetrical layout. Text on left, two overlapping couple portrait images on right with soft drop-shadows.
components_structure.RitualsSchedule: Vertical timeline. Alternating left/right layout. Custom icons for Haldi, Mehendi, Sangeet, Muhurtham, Reception.
components_structure.VenueAndMap: Card container with Google Maps iframe embed. Address details with an elegant gold border.
components_structure.RSVP: Form section with inputs customized to match the theme (warm tints, maroon focus rings). Submit button triggers confetti.
components_structure.Footer: Dark Maroon background (#4A1C1C) with Gold text. WhatsApp share and 'Copy Link' buttons.

hero_background.description: 3D rendered South Indian temple gopuram with glowing lamps and marigolds. Use as parallax background in Hero.

preloader_diya.description: 3D glowing brass diya on banana leaf. Use in preloader and scattered as small decorative motifs.

venue_mandapam.description: Luxurious South Indian mandapam. Use as background for Venue or Rituals section with heavy black/maroon overlay (bg-black/50).

couple_portrait_1.description: Couple embracing in ornate structure. Use in Our Story section.

couple_portrait_2.description: Couple walking downstairs. Overlap with portrait 1 in Our Story section.

marigold_decoration.description: Marigold flowers. Mask/clip or use as decorative elements floating in hero.

instructions_to_main_agent: The user requested a 'single-file HTML' experience. Since this is a React Vite environment, build the entire application cohesively within 'src/App.jsx' to deliver a seamless single-page experience.
Execute 60fps animations. Use 'framer-motion' for scroll-triggered fades, parallax scrolling, and the 3D depth effect in the hero section.
Install necessary packages: 'yarn add framer-motion canvas-confetti lucide-react'.
Implement the Preloader: A full-screen div with z-index 100 that displays the 'preloader_diya' image pulsing. Fade out after 2.5 seconds.
Hero Parallax: Use framer-motion useScroll to make the 'hero_background' image scroll at a different speed than the foreground text. Add floating CSS keyframe animations for flowers.
Typography: Import 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Outfit', and 'Italiana' from Google Fonts in the index.html or global CSS.
Data Test IDs: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (e.g., 'data-testid="nav-link-story"', 'data-testid="rsvp-submit-button"', 'data-testid="share-whatsapp"').
RSVP Form: Implement a functional-looking React state form. On submit, prevent default, show a success message, and fire the 'canvas-confetti' explosion.
Responsiveness: Ensure the timeline switches from alternating (desktop) to left-aligned (mobile). Ensure images do not exceed 80vh on mobile.
